zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cheyne於大約1386年出生在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯丘其時，他的父親Richard Cheyne34歲，母親Margaret de Cralle32歲。他和Eleanor Salerne至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他於1416年在英國肯特被列為member of parliament (knight of the shire)。他去世於1441年6月14日之前在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cheyne was born about 1386, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Cheyne, was 34 and his mother, Margaret de Cralle, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Eleanor Salerne. In 1416, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as member of parliament (knight of the shire) in Kent, England. He died before 14 June 1441, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary and St Sexburga (Minster Abbey): Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cheyne est né environ 1386, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Cheyne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Cralle, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Eleanor Salerne. En 1416, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament (knight of the shire) à Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 14 juin 1441, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Mary and St Sexburga (Minster Abbey): Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Cheyne um 1386 in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Cheyne 34 und seine Mutter Margaret de Cralle 32. Er hatte mit Eleanor Salerne mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1416, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament (knight of the shire) in Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 14. Juni 1441 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cheyne è nato il circa 1386 nel Eastchurch, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Cheyne, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Cralle, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Eleanor Salerne. Nel 1416, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament (knight of the shire) nel Kent, England. Morì prima del 14 giugno 1441, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Cheyneが約1386年にイギリスイギリスケントエアストチャーチで生まれた時，父Richard Cheyneは34歳，母Margaret de Cralleは32歳であった。彼はEleanor Salerneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1416年，31歳の時，イギリスケントでの職業はmember of parliament (knight of the shire)と記録されている。彼は1441年6月14日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスケントイスル オフ シェッピーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary and St Sexburga (Minster Abbey): 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이슬일 프 셰프피
ko.lifeSummary: William Cheyne(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cheyne(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Cralle(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Eleanor Salerne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1416년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 켄트에서 member of parliament (knight of the shire)이었다. 그는 1441년 6월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이슬일 프 셰프피에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary and St Sexburga (Minster Abbey): Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Cheyne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Cralle, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Eleanor Salerne. Em 1416, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament (knight of the shire) em Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 14 de junho de 1441, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary and St Sexburga (Minster Abbey): исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cheyne родился около 1386 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Cheyne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cralle, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Eleanor Salerne. В 1416 году, в возрасте 31 год,  он работал по профессии member of parliament (knight of the shire) в местности кэнт, Англия. Он умер перед 14 июнь 1441 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Eleanor Salerne. En 1416, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament (knight of the shire) en Kent, Inglaterra.
